title: Thandi and the Fairy Tale School Play
synopsis: Thandi is nervous about playing Goldilocks in her class fairy tale play, but with help from her diverse group of friends and some magical mishaps during rehearsal, she learns that being yourself is the best way to shine on stage.

pages.text: Thandi bounced into her classroom on Monday morning. Her teacher, Ms. Rodriguez, had big news. "Class, we're putting on a fairy tale play!" she announced with a smile. All the children cheered and clapped their hands. Thandi's dark eyes sparkled with excitement.

illustration.description: A bright, colorful classroom with diverse children sitting on a rainbow carpet. Ms. Rodriguez, a cheerful Latina teacher with curly hair, stands by a whiteboard with fairy tale drawings. Thandi, a young Black girl with neat braids and big expressive eyes, sits cross-legged looking excited.
illustration.alt: Thandi and her classmates listening to their teacher announce the fairy tale play

pages.text: "We'll do the story of Goldilocks and the Three Bears," Ms. Rodriguez continued. She held up a hat filled with paper slips. "Everyone will pick a part!" Thandi crossed her fingers. She hoped for a good role. Maybe she could be Baby Bear!

illustration.description: Ms. Rodriguez holding a colorful striped hat with paper slips. Children of different ethnicities raise their hands eagerly. Thandi has her fingers crossed with a hopeful expression, her school uniform neat and tidy. Bright classroom decorations frame the scene.
illustration.alt: The teacher holding a hat with play roles while excited students raise their hands

pages.text: One by one, kids picked their parts. Marcus got Papa Bear. Lily became Mama Bear. Ahmed was Baby Bear. Then Ms. Rodriguez called Thandi's name. Thandi reached into the hat and pulled out her slip. "Goldilocks!" she read aloud. Everyone clapped, but Thandi felt her tummy flip-flop.

illustration.description: Thandi holding up a small piece of paper with 'Goldilocks' written on it. Her expression shows surprise and nervousness. Around her, diverse classmates including Marcus (a tall boy), Lily (an Asian girl), and Ahmed (a boy with a hijabi sister watching) are clapping and smiling.
illustration.alt: Thandi looking surprised as she reads her role as Goldilocks

pages.text: At lunch, Thandi sat with her friends. "I'm scared," she whispered to Priya. "What if I forget my lines?" Priya munched her apple. "Don't worry," she said. "You'll be great!" But Thandi still felt worried. She had never been the main character before.

illustration.description: A school cafeteria scene with Thandi and Priya, a girl with long dark hair, sitting at a lunch table. Thandi looks worried while picking at her sandwich. Other diverse children eat lunch in the background. Warm lighting creates a cozy atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Thandi looking worried at lunch while talking to her friend Priya

pages.text: "Maybe I don't look like Goldilocks," Thandi said sadly. Marcus overheard from the next table. "So what?" he laughed. "I don't look like a bear either!" He made a silly bear face and growled. "ROAR!" Everyone giggled. Even Thandi smiled a little.

illustration.description: Marcus making an exaggerated bear face with his hands up like claws, tongue sticking out playfully. Thandi is starting to smile while other kids at nearby lunch tables are laughing. The cafeteria is bright with colorful lunch trays and diverse students enjoying the silly moment.
illustration.alt: Marcus making a silly bear face to cheer up Thandi at lunch

pages.text: After lunch, they had their first rehearsal. Ms. Rodriguez gave everyone their scripts. "Remember," she said, "fairy tales are magical. Anything can happen!" Thandi looked at her lines. There were so many words! But Ahmed whispered, "We'll help each other." That made her feel better.

illustration.description: Children sitting in a circle on the classroom floor holding colorful scripts. Ms. Rodriguez sits with them, gesturing encouragingly. Thandi looks at her script with determination while Ahmed, a kind boy with warm eyes, leans over supportively. Sunlight streams through windows creating a magical atmosphere.
illustration.alt: The class sitting in a circle reading their scripts for the first time

pages.text: The next day, they practiced on the stage. Thandi walked to the pretend house. "Someone has been eating my porridge!" she said in her best Goldilocks voice. But then something funny happened. The fake porridge bowl started to glow! "Ooh!" gasped all the children.

illustration.description: Thandi on a small school stage pointing at a glowing bowl of pretend porridge. Her expression shows surprise and wonder. The three bears (Marcus, Lily, and Ahmed in simple costume pieces) watch in amazement. Sparkles and magical light emanate from the bowl in the dimly lit auditorium.
illustration.alt: Thandi discovering the magically glowing porridge bowl during rehearsal

pages.text: Ms. Rodriguez looked puzzled. "That's strange," she said. When Lily sat in Baby Bear's chair, it started rocking by itself! "Whee!" she laughed as it rocked back and forth. "This is the best rehearsal ever!" shouted Ahmed. Even Thandi forgot to be nervous. This was too much fun!

illustration.description: Lily sitting in a small chair that's magically rocking on its own, her arms raised in delight. Other children watch with joy and amazement. Ms. Rodriguez stands nearby with a confused but amused expression. The stage has a whimsical, enchanted quality with subtle sparkles in the air.
illustration.alt: Lily enjoying a magical ride in the self-rocking chair

pages.text: When it was time for the bed scene, something amazing happened. As Thandi lay down on Baby Bear's bed, she began to float! "Look at me!" she called out, giggling as she floated three feet above the bed. "I'm flying like a real fairy tale character!" All her worries disappeared. This was magical!

illustration.description: Thandi floating gracefully above a small bed, her arms outstretched with pure joy on her face. Her braids seem to float too. Below her, amazed classmates point and cheer. Golden sparkles surround her in the magical moment. The stage lighting creates a dreamy, enchanted atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Thandi floating magically above Baby Bear's bed while her classmates cheer

pages.text: On the night of the play, Thandi's family sat in the front row. Her mom, dad, and little brother Kabo waved at her. Thandi wore a yellow dress and had her hair in beautiful braids with ribbons. She still felt a little nervous, but she was excited too.

illustration.description: Thandi peeking from behind stage curtains wearing a bright yellow dress with ribbon-adorned braids. In the audience, her loving family - mom in a colorful dress, dad in a suit, and little brother Kabo - wave enthusiastically. The auditorium is filled with diverse families.
illustration.alt: Thandi in costume peeking at her family in the audience before the play

pages.text: The play began perfectly. Thandi remembered all her lines! When she found the porridge, it glowed again. The audience said, "Ooh!" When she sat in the chair, it rocked magically. When she lay on the bed, she floated up high. "Amazing!" called out her dad. Thandi beamed with pride.

illustration.description: Thandi floating above the bed during the performance, arms spread wide with a brilliant smile. The audience watches in wonder, including her proud family in the front row. Stage lights create a warm, magical glow around her floating figure. Other cast members watch from the wings.
illustration.alt: Thandi floating triumphantly during the play performance as the audience watches in amazement

pages.text: When the three bears came home, they were perfect too. "Someone has been sleeping in my bed!" roared Marcus. Thandi woke up and ran away, but she was laughing. At the end, everyone bowed. The audience clapped and cheered. "You were wonderful, Goldilocks!" called Ms. Rodriguez. Thandi felt like a real star.

illustration.description: The entire cast taking a bow on stage - Thandi in the center with Marcus, Lily, and Ahmed beside her, all holding hands and smiling brightly. The audience gives a standing ovation. Colorful stage lights illuminate the happy scene. Everyone's faces beam with accomplishment and joy.
illustration.alt: The cast taking their final bow as the audience gives them a standing ovation

metadata.illustrationStyle: Playful storybook illustration style. Rich saturated colors. Expressive characters with big eyes. Whimsical, like Pixar concept art.

questions.question: What fairy tale does Thandi's class perform?
questions.explanation: Ms. Rodriguez announces that they will perform Goldilocks and the Three Bears.

questions.question: Who plays Baby Bear in the school play?
questions.explanation: Ahmed gets the role of Baby Bear when the children pick parts from the hat.

questions.question: What magical thing happens to the porridge bowl?
questions.explanation: During rehearsal, the fake porridge bowl starts to glow, surprising everyone.

questions.question: How does Marcus help Thandi feel better about her worries?
choices: He tells her to quit the play
He makes a silly bear face
questions.explanation: Marcus cheers up Thandi by making a silly bear face and growling, making everyone laugh.

questions.question: What happens when Thandi lies on Baby Bear's bed?
questions.explanation: Thandi begins to float three feet above the bed when she lies down, both during rehearsal and the performance.

pages.title: Magic Words
pages.instructions: Choose the right words to describe the magical events!
pages.text: During rehearsal, amazing things happened! The porridge bowl started to ___. When Lily sat in Baby Bear's chair, it started ___ by itself. When Thandi lay on the bed, she began to ___ in the air!
